guard_role: bounded readiness guard for replacing a witness-slot surface
replacement_allowed_only_if: contract inputs actually supply an inhabitant of RestrictedCompositionTarget
the supplied edge has shape RestrictedLiftSourceChainCompositionInputContract -> RestrictedCompositionTarget
the supplied edge does not imply ZeroDayClosure
the supplied edge does not imply unrestricted ZeroDayClosure
the supplied edge does not erase the restricted boundary
positive_claim: records readiness criteria for a future real restricted-edge witness
non_claims: does not construct the restricted edge
does not construct an unrestricted zero-day closure
does not erase the restricted boundary
does not prove the restricted-to-unrestricted lift
does not add SNOLAB or external empirical evidence
next_weakest_point: Supply an actual restricted-edge inhabitant only after these readiness criteria are met.
